title: The Kiosk Within the Kiosk

features.name: screen-within-screen
features.desc-on-touch: you see yourself seeing yourself seeing yourself. the recursion is stable at this depth, but you're not sure if you're still shrinking

features.name: miniature-doorway
features.desc-on-touch: a door at the size of your hand, standing alone. behind it, another kiosk, even smaller

features.name: loop-marker
features.desc-on-touch: a plaque that reads: DEPTH: -1. the negative is intentional. you're not sure what it means

features.name: still-water
features.desc-on-touch: a perfect mirror of static. your reflection moves wrong, a frame behind

inscription: status: fractally stable—you can keep walking in and the kiosk will keep explaining itself to itself

file.name: KioskSelfModel_depth-n.tmp
file.note: a rendering algorithm that takes itself as input. the file size decreases with each layer but never reaches zero

exits.label: the doorway you entered through, now much taller
down the rabbit slope, into code
exits.to: NEW: the theorem room, where logic begins to wonder about itself
